# Sand & Stars Touring

> Owner-led private guided tours of Moab's canyon country and the Mighty 5 (Arches, Canyonlands, Capitol Reef, Bryce, Zion) plus the wider Grand Circle. Based in Moab, Utah. Private groups only, whole-vehicle pricing, everything included (park fees, water, snacks, logistics, expert local guide, hotel pickup). Inquiry-first: every tour starts with a short conversation, and we usually reply same day. Operating under National Park Service and BLM permits.

## What we offer
- Private half-day (4hr), extended (6hr), and full-day (8hr) tours from Moab.
- Custom and bespoke multi-park / Mighty 5 / Grand Circle expeditions.
- Tours are private to your group; per-person rates drop as the group grows.
- Inclusive pricing: park entry fees, water and snacks, all logistics, and an expert local guide are in the rate.

## Contact and booking
- Email: tours@sandandstars.com
- Phone / text: (435) 260-8260
- Booking is inquiry-first — email, text, or call for a fast custom suggestion or to reserve. Site: https://sandandstars.com/

## Key pages
- [Home](https://sandandstars.com/): overview, tour picker, what's included, reviews.
- [All Tours](https://sandandstars.com/tours.html): every tour with length, parks, and pricing.
- [Pricing](https://sandandstars.com/pricing.html): per-person rates by group size and tour length, all-inclusive.
- [Bespoke Expeditions](https://sandandstars.com/bespoke.html): Mighty 5 and Grand Circle custom multi-day trips.
- [Trip Planning](https://sandandstars.com/planning.html): seasons, climate, what to bring, local resources.
- [Gallery](https://sandandstars.com/gallery.html): photography from real tours.
- [About](https://sandandstars.com/about.html): who guides, how we operate.
- [FAQ](https://sandandstars.com/faq.html): common questions on pricing, groups, seasons, and what's included.
- [Contact](https://sandandstars.com/contact.html): reach the team.

## Tours (each has its own detail page under /tours/)
- [Arches National Park](https://sandandstars.com/tours/arches.html): half or full day; iconic arches including The Windows, Balanced Rock, and Delicate Arch. Most-booked half day.
- [Best of Moab to Dead Horse Point](https://sandandstars.com/tours/deadhorse.html): half day; rock art, dinosaur tracks, 4x4 roads, remote overlooks, and Dead Horse Point.
- [Canyonlands: Island in the Sky](https://sandandstars.com/tours/isky.html): full or extended day; Mesa Arch, Grand View Point, Upheaval Dome, plus Dead Horse Point.
- [Lush Canyon Hike + Local Gems (Mill Creek)](https://sandandstars.com/tours/mill.html): half day; shaded creek canyon with waterfalls, coolest tour in summer.
- [Arches + Best of Moab Custom Combo](https://sandandstars.com/tours/archescombo.html): full day; Arches in the morning, Best of Moab variety in the afternoon.
- [Castle Valley](https://sandandstars.com/tours/castle.html): half day; Castleton Tower, Priest and Nuns, Fisher Towers, best at golden hour.
- [Rock Art](https://sandandstars.com/tours/rockart.html): half day; ancestral Puebloan petroglyph and pictograph panels.
- [Dino Tracks & Bones](https://sandandstars.com/tours/dino.html): half day; dinosaur trackways and bone beds, great for families.
- [Local Gems](https://sandandstars.com/tours/localgems.html): half day; hidden overlooks and viewpoints with no crowds.
- [Canyonlands: The Needles](https://sandandstars.com/tours/needles.html): full day; remote candy-striped sandstone spires.
- [Canyonlands: The Maze](https://sandandstars.com/tours/maze.html): full day / overnight; the least-visited district, deep backcountry and solitude.
- [Nighthike (Moonlight Walk)](https://sandandstars.com/tours/night.html): ~3hr evening; desert by moonlight, dark-sky stargazing.

## Service area
Moab, Utah and surrounding canyon country: Arches National Park, Canyonlands National Park (Island in the Sky, Needles, Maze), Dead Horse Point State Park, Castle Valley, Mill Creek, plus the full Mighty 5 and Grand Circle by bespoke arrangement.
